evals.prompt: How do I set up a Room database DAO that reactively emits updates whenever my product table changes?
evals.expected_output: Return Flow<List<Product>> from the @Query method in the @Dao interface. Collect the flow in the Repository. Room emits automatically on table changes. Insert/update/delete should be suspend.

evals.prompt: Should I use SharedPreferences or DataStore for storing user settings in my Android app?
evals.expected_output: Use DataStore — either PreferencesDataStore (simple key-value) or ProtoDataStore (type-safe schema). SharedPreferences is synchronous, doesn't support coroutines natively, and has no type safety.

evals.prompt: Can I pass a Room @Entity directly to my ViewModel to display in the UI?
evals.expected_output: No — map @Entity to a Domain model or UI model in the Repository. Leaking Room entities into the UI layer creates a dependency on the data layer and makes refactoring harder.

should_not_trigger: Store auth tokens securely using EncryptedSharedPreferences
Encrypt sensitive data using Android Keystore

Set up WorkManager to read from a database and sync to server
